definitions.text: A dwelling. One’s own dwelling place; the house or structure in which one lives; especially the house in which one lives with one's family; the habitual abode of one’s family. The place (residence, settlement, country, etc.), where a person was born or raised; childhood or parental home; home of one’s parents or guardian.
examples: Does she still live at home? - No, she moved out and got an apartment when she was 18, but she still lives in the city.
It's what you bring into a house that makes it a home

definitions.text: Of, from, or pertaining to one’s dwelling or country; domestic; not foreign. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
To one's home. To one's place of residence or one's customary or official location.
To one's place of residence or one's customary or official location.
